summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Copay Tracking feature. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend copay input in pharmacy portal and copay stats display in admin dashboard verified working correctly.

backend: GET /api/admin/dashboard - Returns copay_to_collect and copay_collected stats
POST /api/orders/ - Creates order with copay_amount field
GET /api/orders/{order_id} - Order has copay_amount and copay_collected=false
GET /api/admin/dashboard - Shows updated copay_to_collect after order creation
GET /api/orders/{order_id} - Order shows copay_collected=true with timestamp
POST /api/orders/ - Creates order without copay (defaults to 0)
POST /api/orders/ - Creates order with explicit zero copay
GET /api/admin/dashboard - Copay aggregation returns correct data types
frontend: Pharmacy Portal - Create Delivery modal opens
Pharmacy Portal - Copay input field visible with data-testid='copay-input'
Pharmacy Portal - Copay amount can be entered ($25.50)
Pharmacy Portal - 'Copay to Collect' label visible
Pharmacy Portal - Copay summary shows entered amount in green
Admin Dashboard - 'Copay to Collect' card displays $0.00 (0 orders pending)
Admin Dashboard - 'Copay Collected' card displays $76.50 (3 orders collected)
Driver Portal - Delivery details modal opens with order info

critical_code_review_comments: Copay tracking feature is well-implemented with proper backend aggregation pipeline
Frontend copay input has proper data-testid for testing
Admin dashboard correctly displays copay stats from API
Driver collect-copay endpoint properly validates order assignment and prevents double collection
seed_data_creation: Created test orders with copay amounts during testing (TEST_Copay_Patient_*, TEST_NoCopay_Patient_*, TEST_ZeroCopay_Patient_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Copay tracking feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST /api/orders/ (with copay_amount), GET /api/admin/dashboard (returns copay_to_collect, copay_collected), POST /api/driver-portal/deliveries/{order_id}/collect-copay. Frontend: Pharmacy portal has copay input in CreateDeliveryModal, Admin dashboard shows Copay Collection section with two cards.

feature_verification.admin_dashboard_displays_copay_stats: VERIFIED - GET /api/admin/dashboard returns copay_to_collect and copay_collected
feature_verification.dashboard_stats_update_after_collection: VERIFIED - Aggregation pipeline correctly calculates pending vs collected
feature_verification.pharmacy_portal_copay_input: VERIFIED - CreateDeliveryModal has copay input with data-testid='copay-input'
